entry.title: Articles (Research)
entry.contentHtml:
• The Science of Baby-Name Trends

    unique names of glittering value, names that may very well be the only thing that glitters in their complicated lives

  • How to Navigate by Nostalgia: The Linguistics of Place Names

    a special name will often be given to a rock no larger than a kitchen table while, on the other hand, what we consider the large and important features of a region’s geography have no names at all
